name: Easy Miso Soup with Vegetables and Tofu
recipeIngredient: 2 corn ears, kernels cut from cob (about 2 cups)
4 oz tofu, firm or soft, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a boil. Add the vegetables and tofu. Cook for 5 minutes.
2. Remove 1/4 cup of the soup liquid and dissolve the miso in it. Stir this mixture back into the soup, reduce heat, and cook for an additional minute or two. Stir before serving, as high-quality misos may separate slightly.
